Metis
Decentralized
Putting power where it belongs - in the hands of the people
Introducing
Community Ecosystem Governance (CEG)
A voting framework for the community to decentralize decision-making
A key milestone on the roadmap towards full decentralization
Empowering individuals to use their voice to govern the ecosystem
This starts with verifying and choosing projects for marketing support
And more to come. Take part today!
+
Introducing
Community Ecosystem Governance (CEG)
A voting framework for the community to decentralize decision-making
A key milestone on the roadmap towards full decentralization
Empowering individuals to use their voice to govern the ecosystem
This starts with verifying and choosing projects for marketing support
And more to come. Take part today!

Advocates
Reaching all around the world.
Metis Advocates help expand and educate the Metis community and spread the word about the Metis network.
Become an Advocate
